name: @n-dimension-database-ndb/mcp
description: Run the nDB Model Context Protocol server with one command — point Claude/Cursor/Codex at an nDB database.
//optionalDependencies: Per-platform binary packages, published by .github/workflows/release.yml. npm installs only the one matching the host. The launcher (bin/ndb-mcp.js) resolves it; in a dev checkout it falls back to target/{release,debug}/ndb-mcp-server.
